title: Vogue Silicone Slotted Turner Spatula, Grey, Flexible High Heat Spatula, Length: 29.5 cm, Silicone Safe for Non-Stick Pans, Heat Resistant up to 260°C, Dishwasher Safe, DA524
features: HEAT RESISTANT UP TO 260°C: Can withstand high temperatures, perfect for various cooking tasks
NON-STICK FRIENDLY: The silicone material ensures your non-stick cookware remains scratch-free
CONVENIENT SLOTTED DESIGN: Drains away excess fats & oils for healthier cooking
EASY TO CLEAN: Dishwasher safe feature makes post-cooking clean-up a breeze
SPACE-SAVING STORAGE: Equipped with a hanging hole in the handle for easy storage on kitchen hooks
DURABLE & LIGHTWEIGHT: Weighing just 400g, this utensil is designed for comfortable handling & longevity
description: Discover the versatility of the Vogue Silicone High Heat Flexible Slotted Turner, a kitchen essential designed to make cooking easier. Its silicone construction is not only non-stick, but it also preserves the integrity of your non-stick cookware, preventing unwanted scratches. The turner’s slotted design adeptly drains away excess oils and fats, promoting healthier cooking options. Specifically engineered to withstand temperatures up to 260°C, this tool is a reliable companion for a wide range of cooking tasks. Cleaning is a breeze as it is dishwasher-safe, allowing you to maintain hygiene effortlessly. It measures 70(W) x 295(L)mm and has a convenient hole in the handle, making it easy to store by hanging. The understated grey colour and durable design make it a practical addition to any kitchen.
